title: awsec2/import-key-pair input
description: Input for awsec2/import-key-pair (ADR-0095 C2). Imports a caller-supplied PUBLIC key — Stratt never generates or handles a private key (§2.5: material never transits the core; server-side CreateKeyPair is deliberately NOT used).

publicKey.description: OpenSSH/PEM PUBLIC key material — public, not secret
